stemHtml: Air Traffic Control Services – The purpose of the issue of Clearances by an Air Traffic Control Unit is to...

options.a: prevent collision between aircraft under its control and expediting and maintaining an orderly flow of traffic.
options.b: provide Flight Information Service and expediting and maintaining an orderly flow of traffic.
options.c: provide advisory service and expediting and maintaining an orderly flow of traffic.
options.d: direct traffic to the shortest routing and expediting and maintaining an orderly flow of traffic.
